title: Install drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for drainage system installation activities

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify drainage system construction site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify drainage system construction site.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required materials, tools, equipment and machinery and complete safe operation and pre-operation checks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a clean and safe work area throughout work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret symbols and terminology to ensure drainage system plan is clearly understood.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify layout of services, check depths and report discrepancies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete survey, measurement and marking out of site and confirm soil characteristics relevant to the system.

elements.title: Undertake installation of drainage system

pcs.text: Complete excavations without damage to services, facilities, features and established plants

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete excavations without damage to services, facilities, features and established plants.

pcs.text: Install drainage system to plan specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install drainage system to plan specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install drainage system to plan specifications.

pcs.text: Test drainage system configuration, flow rates and capacity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test drainage system configuration, flow rates and capacity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test drainage system configuration, flow rates and capacity.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm remedial action to be taken when the drainage system operation does not meet the plan specifications.
